Event: Spring Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR229
Honorary Hunter of the Order Gear

Once in a while, the unit becomes impervious to targeting by enemy mages' attacks and abilities for 4 sec. Also during this time, the armor wearer deals physical damage to 2 random enemies (preferred target: mages) every second equal to 150% of the unit's attack and restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 98-100
